'''âz-g-n''' ('''kazagan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyme|lyme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyme|lyme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazagan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizagan|thizagan]] || [[word:jizagan|jizagan]] || [[word:shizagan|shizagan]] || [[word:kizagan|kizagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzagan|thuthuzagan]] || [[word:jujuzagan|jujuzagan]] || [[word:shushuzagan|shushuzagan]] || [[word:kukuzagan|kukuzagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzagan|thuzagan]] || [[word:juzagan|juzagan]] || [[word:shuzagan|shuzagan]] || [[word:kuzagan|kuzagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzagan|thuzagan]] || [[word:juzagan|juzagan]] || [[word:shuzagan|shuzagan]] || [[word:kuzagan|kuzagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezagan|thezagan]] || [[word:jezagan|jezagan]] || [[word:shezagan|shezagan]] || [[word:kezagan|kezagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozagan|thothozagan]] || [[word:jojozagan|jojozagan]] || [[word:shoshozagan|shoshozagan]] || [[word:kokozagan|kokozagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozagan|thozagan]] || [[word:jozagan|jozagan]] || [[word:shozagan|shozagan]] || [[word:kozagan|kozagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozagan|thozagan]] || [[word:jozagan|jozagan]] || [[word:shozagan|shozagan]] || [[word:kozagan|kozagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzagan|thĂŠzagan]] || [[word:jĂŠzagan|jĂŠzagan]] || [[word:shĂŠzagan|shĂŠzagan]] || [[word:kĂŠzagan|kĂŠzagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazagan|thathazagan]] || [[word:jajazagan|jajazagan]] || [[word:shashazagan|shashazagan]] || [[word:kakazagan|kakazagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazagan|thazagan]] || [[word:jazagan|jazagan]] || [[word:shazagan|shazagan]] || [[word:kazagan|kazagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazagan|thazagan]] || [[word:jazagan|jazagan]] || [[word:shazagan|shazagan]] || [[word:kazagan|kazagan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazagan|shazagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazagan|goshazagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazagan|gokishazagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazaganĂŒ|shazaganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazaganknĂŒ|goshazaganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaganĂŒ|gokishazaganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazaganshĂ«|shazaganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazagankshĂ«|goshazagankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazaganshĂ«|gokishazaganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaganro|shazaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazagankro|goshazagankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaganro|gokishazaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaganmu|shazaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazagankmu|goshazagankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaganmu|gokishazaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazagansher|shazagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazaganksher|goshazaganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazagansher|gokishazagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazagang|shazagang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazagankng|goshazagankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazagang|gokishazagang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazaganya|shazaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazagankya|goshazagankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazaganya|gokishazaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazaganyam|shazaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazagankyam|goshazagankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazaganyam|gokishazaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaganĂŒshĂ«|shazaganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaganknĂŒshĂ«|goshazaganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaganĂŒshĂ«|gokishazaganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaganĂŒro|shazaganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaganknĂŒro|goshazaganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaganĂŒro|gokishazaganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaganĂŒmu|shazaganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaganknĂŒmu|goshazaganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaganĂŒmu|gokishazaganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaganshĂ«nĂŒ|shazaganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazagankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazagankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazaganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaganshĂ«ro|shazaganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazagankshĂ«ro|goshazagankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaganshĂ«ro|gokishazaganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaganshĂ«mu|shazaganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazagankshĂ«mu|goshazagankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaganshĂ«mu|gokishazaganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaganronĂŒ|shazaganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazagankronĂŒ|goshazagankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaganronĂŒ|gokishazaganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaganroshĂ«|shazaganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazagankroshĂ«|goshazagankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaganroshĂ«|gokishazaganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaganromu|shazaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazagankromu|goshazagankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaganromu|gokishazaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaganmunĂŒ|shazaganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazagankmunĂŒ|goshazagankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaganmunĂŒ|gokishazaganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaganmushĂ«|shazaganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazagankmushĂ«|goshazagankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaganmushĂ«|gokishazaganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaganmuro|shazaganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazagankmuro|goshazagankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaganmuro|gokishazaganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|718161e}}
